package rulecoverage

func PositiveRepositoryReturnsFrameworkBuilderToUpperLayer() string {
    ruleID := "repository_returns_framework_builder_to_upper_layer"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repositories that leak `*gorm.DB`, `sqlx.NamedStmt`, query builders, or raw rows to higher layers instead of returning results or domain abstractions."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
